'''taturu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reach|reach]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reach|reach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| taturu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tætirith|tætirith]] || [[word:tætirij|tætirij]] || [[word:tætirish|tætirish]] || [[word:tætiri|tætiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tatuturuth|tatuturuth]] || [[word:tatuturuj|tatuturuj]] || [[word:tatuturush|tatuturush]] || [[word:tatuturu|tatuturu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:taturuth|taturuth]] || [[word:taturuj|taturuj]] || [[word:taturush|taturush]] || [[word:taturu|taturu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tatufruth|tatufruth]] || [[word:tatufruj|tatufruj]] || [[word:tatufrush|tatufrush]] || [[word:tatufruf|tatufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:taturuthu|taturuthu]] || [[word:taturuju|taturuju]] || [[word:taturushu|taturushu]] || [[word:taturuku|taturuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:taturuth|taturuth]] || [[word:taturuj|taturuj]] || [[word:taturush|taturush]] || [[word:taturu|taturu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:taturuthul|taturuthul]] || [[word:taturujul|taturujul]] || [[word:taturushul|taturushul]] || [[word:taturukul|taturukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:taturuthuthu|taturuthuthu]] || [[word:taturujuju|taturujuju]] || [[word:taturushushu|taturushushu]] || [[word:taturuku|taturuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:taturuthun|taturuthun]] || [[word:taturujun|taturujun]] || [[word:taturushun|taturushun]] || [[word:taturukun|taturukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:taturuthuoro|taturuthuoro]] || [[word:taturujuoro|taturujuoro]] || [[word:taturushuoro|taturushuoro]] || [[word:taturukuoro|taturukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
